evals.prompt: I need to find some landscape photos for a blog post about remote work. Something with laptops in coffee shops or home offices. Can you search for me and show me what's available?
evals.expected_output: Should use searchPhotos (Pexels) and/or get_search_photos (Unsplash) with orientation=landscape, present results with image URLs at multiple sizes, mention Unsplash download tracking requirement if Unsplash used
expectations: Used searchPhotos (Pexels) or get_search_photos (Unsplash) MCP tool to search for photos
Set orientation to landscape in the search parameters
Used a relevant search query related to remote work, laptops, coffee shops, or home offices
Returned actual photo results with image URLs (not just instructions on how to search)
Mentioned or showed multiple image size options (e.g., src.small, src.medium, src.large or urls.small, urls.regular)

evals.prompt: I'm building a landing page and need a short background video loop — something techy, like abstract data or particles. Needs to be at least 1080p and under 15 seconds. What tools can I use and how?
evals.expected_output: Should recommend searchVideos and/or getPopularVideos from Pexels, use min_width=1920 and max_duration=15 parameters, explain video_files quality levels, note Unsplash doesn't have video
expectations: Used searchVideos or getPopularVideos MCP tool from Pexels
Applied a resolution constraint (min_width: 1920 or size: medium/large)
Applied a duration constraint (max_duration: 15 or mentioned filtering by duration)
Returned actual video results with video file URLs or quality options
Noted that Unsplash does not support video content (only Pexels has videos)

evals.prompt: I found a great photo on Pexels (id: 3184291) and want to use it in my app. Can you grab it and upload it to our MinIO storage so we have a permanent copy?
evals.expected_output: Should use getPhoto to get the photo details, then a-minio-uploadImageToMinio to upload using the photo URL, explain which size to pick, provide the hosted MinIO URL back
expectations: Used getPhoto MCP tool with id 3184291 to retrieve the photo
Used a-minio-uploadImageToMinio to upload the photo to MinIO storage
Passed an actual Pexels image URL (from getPhoto response) to the MinIO upload tool
Returned the MinIO hosted URL to the user
Mentioned or recommended an appropriate image size rather than defaulting to the largest original
